title: centaurea pinae var. aragonensis
intro: Centaurea pinae var. aragonensis, also known as Aragon Centaury, is a plant species in the asteraceae family, characterized by its small, white or pink flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Aragon Centaury include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function, making it a sought-after herbal remedy for various health issues. Aragon Centaury can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
